config.title: Menedżer licencji #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script: 'getcurrent #include "50203" dim pM60137 : set pM60137 = doc_.getmodule(60137) class CLicenceInfo public m_strCode public m_strName public m_nCount public m_nOrgCount public m_strTypeDescription public m_bTemporary private sub class_initialize() m_nCount = clng(0) m_nOrgCount = clng(0) m_strTypeDescription = "???" m_bTemporary = true end sub end class dim pArray : set pArray = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() dim g_strUserId : g_strUserId = "" dim g_pArrLic : set g_pArrLic = nothing function fopen : fopen = true dim pFirma : set pFirma = getCurrentFirma() if not pFirma is nothing then g_strUserId = pFirma.strNIP end if rebuild_content end function function frefresh rebuild_content end function sub rebuild_content pArray.RemoveAll set g_pArrLic = pM60137.get_create_licence_objects(false) if g_pArrLic is nothing then exit sub end if dim pM60106 : set pM60106 = doc_.getmodule(60106) dim iter dim nEBModMask : nEBModMask = 1 for iter = 0 to g_pArrLic.UpperIndex() dim pLI : set pLI = new CLicenceInfo pArray.Add pLI pLI.m_strName= pM60106.LicModuleName(nEBModMask) pLI.m_nCount = g_pArrLic.value(iter).nStanowiska pLI.m_nOrgCount = pLI.m_nCount dim nLicInfo : nLicInfo = pM60137.get_licence_info_and_update(g_pArrLic.value(iter)) if nLicInfo < -1 then pLI.m_strTypeDescription = "nieaktualna" else if nLicInfo = 0 then pLI.m_strTypeDescription = "stała" pLI.m_bTemporary = false else if nLicInfo = -1 then pLI.m_strTypeDescription = "tymczasowa, już nie ważna" else pLI.m_strTypeDescription = "tymczasowa, ważna jeszcze " + cstr(nLicInfo) + " dni" end if end if end if page_.ctrl(CTRLID_LICREG * 10 + iter).disable = true nEBModMask = nEBModMask + nEBModMask next end sub function c##CTRLID_USERID##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) c##CTRLID_USERID##_ongetdata=true oCtrl.value = g_strUserId end function function c##CTRLID_USERID##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) c##CTRLID_USERID##_ondataentered = true g_strUserId = newValue end function #macro VBX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(_nr_) \ function c##CTRLID_MODNAME##_nr_##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_MODNAME##_nr_##_ongetdata=true \ oCtrl.value = pArray.Value(_nr_).m_strName \ end function \ function c##CTRLID_LICTYPE##_nr_##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_LICTYPE##_nr_##_ongetdata=true \ oCtrl.value = pArray.Value(_nr_).m_strTypeDescription \ end function \ function c##CTRLID_LICCOUNT##_nr_##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_LICCOUNT##_nr_##_ongetdata=true \ oCtrl.value = pArray.Value(_nr_).m_nCount \ with pArray.Value(_nr_) \ page_.ctrl(CTRLID_LICREG##_nr_).disable = (trim(g_strUserId) = "") or _ \ (not ((.m_nCount > 0) and ((true) or .m_bTemporary))) \ end with \ end function \ function c##CTRLID_LICCOUNT##_nr_##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue): c##CTRLID_LICCOUNT##_nr_##_ondataentered = true \ pArray.Value(_nr_).m_nCount = newValue \ end function #macro QXX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(_nr_) \ \ QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_MODNAME##_nr_,20,1) \ \ QXE_INT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_LICCOUNT##_nr_,5) \ \ QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_LICTYPE##_nr_,0,1) \ QXC_BUTTON(CTRLID_LICREG##_nr_,0,Zarejestruj,varFunctionHLI="register_licence",1) \ VBX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(0) VBX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(1) VBX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(2) VBX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(3) VBX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(4) VBX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(5) function register_licence(byref pHLI) dim nModule : nModule = pHLI.prop(PROPC_CONTROL) mod 10 trans_.message 0,1, pArray.Value(nModule).m_strName dim pM60123 : set pM60123 = doc_.getmodule(60123) pM60123.register_run g_pArrLic.value(nModule),g_strUserId,clng(pArray.Value(nModule).m_nCount) frefresh end function

table.tbody:
QXC_LABEL_REQ(NIP (identyfikator użytkownika) ,1)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
Moduł
Liczba stanowisk
Rodzaj licencji
Operacja
QXX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(0) QXX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(1) QXX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(2) QXX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(3) QXX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(4) QXX_MODULE_LIC_ROW(5)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
Zamknij
